desc: Shuffle 3 cards into the Deck (any combination of "D/D" monsters in your hand, field, or Graveyard, and/or "D/D" cards in your Pendulum Zone), then you can add 2 "D/D" monsters from your Deck to your hand.
eff: Shuffle 3 cards into the Deck (any combination of "D/D" monsters in your hand, field, or Graveyard, and/or "D/D" cards in your Pendulum Zone), then you can add 2 "D/D" monsters from your Deck to your hand.

action: Returns from your field to your Deck
Returns from your hand to your Deck
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
